overview: Qwen3-Coder is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen-Coder line. Released 2025-07-22. Open-weight code-specialised models tuned for agentic coding, repository-scale context, and tool use.

What's notable in this version: Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct (480B total / 35B active MoE) for agentic coding, matching frontier closed models on SWE-bench-style tasks; a smaller Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct ('Coder Flash') followed on 2025-07-31; Apache 2.0.
